name: compliance closed-loop validation cleans up synthetic test artifacts after a successful run
command: mkdir -p compliance && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/closed-loop-validate.sh" --synthetic-framework test-fw --controls-out compliance/controls.yaml --cleanup 2>out.txt && ! grep -q 'test-fw' compliance/controls.yaml && grep -q 'cleanup=done' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
